3208460.name: Rogue Braver | 勇者ローグ
3208460.description:
Classic Roguelike A procedurally generated dungeon that changes shape every time you enter. We prioritize smooth controls and pacing, allowing for stress-free adventures with our special fast-movement feature (known as K-Dash). Whether you prefer to move quickly or take your time, the turn-based system accommodates both playstyles.

Identification System When you use a wand or equip a piercing, the effects are automatically identified if their properties become clear. In the dungeon's shop, simply drop your items on the floor and speak to the shopkeeper, "Panda," to automatically get the selling price labeled on the items.

3D Models Almost all graphics are original.

Keyboard and Controller Support Some key assignments can be customized through "Settings" → "Key Configuration."
